title: Tenure unaffected
doc_html:
§951.6.  Tenure unaffected

This Part shall not affect in any way the right of the Orleans Parish School Board to remove employees from service under the laws now in force or hereafter enacted.

Redesignated from R.S. 17:1016 pursuant to R.S. 24:253.
